text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the winning concert, Smart Falcon meets up
with the fan she made the promise to.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Heeey, what did you think of the concert?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: It was amazing! Just amazing! Really... Thank you sooo much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Haha! ☆ Thank you for the support! ♪ And this person next to you must be...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Right! This is the friend I mentioned. She's feeling
much better now!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, it's the actual Falco! Your concert was i-i-incredible!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! ☆ If you're ever feeling down
again, don't hesitate to come and watch me
perform!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! I'll come as many times as I can!
P-please let me do something to thank you for
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans take us to a ramen
shop.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You own a ramen shop?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I had an idea for a new recipe when I was
watching your concert. I want you to try it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my concert inspired a new ramen recipe?!
How does that even happen?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: She's been struggling to come up with a new recipe for so long... I'm so... so glad she finally did iiiit! Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
The best way to see how you inspired this recipe
is to try it! Here you go—I call it Umadol ☆
Ramen!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow, it looks super tasty! Here goes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
(I can taste the umami of the crab within the rich
miso, and the butter conceals a fluffy milk aroma
which permeates the dish!)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It has such a gentle flavor. ☆ It's so good, I need
to be careful not to stuff my face! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I made sure each ingredient shines brightly, just
like a winning concert! The flavors all work
together to elevate each other, just like
Umamusume as they aim for the center position!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Amazing! It really is Umadol ☆ Ramen! ♪ I love it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon chats away with her fans while
enjoying the delicious ramen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans take us to a place
with a view of the city.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! This view is fantastic! What a lovely
spot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, this is my favorite view in the area! I
figured this would be a great place for the
unveiling!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the fan unfurls a large homemade
banner.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Falco! Wow! You've really made my
day!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I made it using the same dyeing techniques as our
local products. I'd like to get a job making this
kind of thing...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text: It looks like you've given her the courage she needed to take this first step... I-I'm so glad she can chase after her dreeeam! Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry it took so long to show you... I really
wanted to finish it in time for your concert.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't say that! It's totally in time! The concert is
just about to start! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
What?! But you must be exhausted! And there's
no equipment here or anything...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No problem! ♪ Anywhere an Umadol sings and
dances becomes a stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by warm-hearted fans, Smart Falcon
performs on her second "stage" of the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans take us to the plaza
outside the train station.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! So many people! I guess it gets really
packed after a race.

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Today is particularly busy, so I thought I'd
perform here!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait... do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She wants to be an idol too! You gave her the
courage to take a step towards achieving her
dream!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
E-erm... Do you have any advice for someone
about to take the stage for the first time?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... The feeling when you step onto
your first stage is one that you'll treasure forever.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Which is to say... um... Ehehe, trying to sound
cool is kinda hard. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I only have one piece of advice! Go out
there and have a great time!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'll be watching from the very front! ☆

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Wow... thank you so much, Falco! That's why I
love you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Smart Falcon watches her fan's debut
performance, cheering for her louder than
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans take us to a nearby
underpass.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's so peaceful here! ♪ ...Hm? Where did
they disappear to?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hellooo! We're da Kansai Sisters! Remember the
name when ya leave!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, I just looove Umadols these days.
Playing dress-up and havin' a little tea party with
'em really brings me back to when I was a little
girl!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hold up... I don't think you're talkin' 'bout
"Umadols." Ya mean "Horsegirl dolls," dummy!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! ☆ That's so funny! Are you two a
comedy act?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We used to do comedy routines at our school
festivals! We'd given it up, but...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you gave us the courage to start again.
Now we're aiming to become professional
comedians!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Could you give us some wisdom
about how to mentally prepare ourselves to go
out on stage?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Okay, allow me to share a little insight
into what I've learned up until now. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon passes down her advice on mentally
preparing for shows to her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans guide us to a quaint
cafe.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what a fancy cafe! I'd come here every day
if I lived in this neighborhood. ☆

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Actually, she owns this cafe! But sales have been
poor, so she was considering closing it down...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You gave me the courage to give it one more
shot, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
For real?! I'm really glad to hear that! It's a lovely
cafe, so I really hope you keep it going! ☆

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Take one of these desserts by way of
thanks! I made the donuts in your likeness!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It looks just like me! The bow decoration is
super cute too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna share a pic on Umatter. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, check it out! ♪ Everyone is saying they
wanna try your donuts!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: R-really?! I'd love it if everyone could try them...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You'll make a killing if you market them well! You
can give them the official Falco seal of approval.
Call them "Falco Donuts" or something! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Falco Donuts become a hot item and
the cafe sees a sudden rise in customers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Smart Falcon's fans take us to a nearby
river.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Doooot! Doo-di-doot! ♪ Doo-doo-doo-doot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's a fanfare! It feels like a race is about to
begin! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Well, I've been playing the trumpet since
I was little...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's aiming to join a brass band! But she failed
the audition...

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking about giving it up... But I found the
guts to keep trying after I saw you race!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I'm so glad to hear that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Listening to you play trumpet really made me
want to blast off down the track! ♪

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. ♪ If you get into that brass band, I'd love it
if you would play at one of my concerts! Let's
meet onstage one day! It's a promise! ☆

text_block_list.name: Female Fan B
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll get in for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They seal their promise to meet onstage in the
future with a hearty handshake!
